title: Stop triggering app deployment pipelines in CI

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Updated .github/workflows/ci.yaml trigger-deployment job to stop starting app deployment pipelines; job now only triggers infrastructure pipeline where configured.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Change landed in commit 1043efc5 on feature/poetry-conversion: CI trigger-deployment job no longer starts app deployment pipelines, only infrastructure pipeline triggers remain.
